next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis including autoimmune encephalitis panel and paraneoplastic antibodies
Send serum autoimmune encephalitis panel (specifically anti-LGI1, anti-NMDA, anti-GABA-B)
Obtain continuous long-term video-EEG to characterize episodes of agitation and rule out subclinical nonconvulsive status epilepticus
Consult psychiatry for management of severe agitation and stabilization of psychotic features
Perform whole-body CT or PET/CT scan to screen for potential paraneoplastic processes
Systematically review and adjust antiseizure medication regimen, specifically evaluating topiramate for psychiatric adverse effects
Maintain strict seizure precautions and close hemodynamic monitoring due to autonomic instability
